title: Captain China
writer: John Bagni, Gwen Bagni, Lewis R. Foster
actors: John Payne, Gail Russell, Jeffrey Lynn
plot: Charles Chinnough, aka Captain China, washed ashore off his ship during a storm, is later rescued, but is relieved of duty after his former first mate, Brendensen (who thought he was dead), and two aides testify falsely against hi...
